settings.title: Settings
settings.exportCsvDesc: Download all your dividend and yield data across all years as a CSV file.
settings.dividendGoalDesc: Set a target for total dividend income this year. Your progress will be shown on the dashboard.
settings.yieldGoalDesc: Set a target for total yield income this year. Your progress will be shown on the dashboard.
settings.steuerfreibetragDesc: Your personal tax-free savings allowance (max. €2,000). Once your dividends exceed this, the chart turns amber.
settings.depotsDesc: Depots let you track dividends and yields across multiple brokers or accounts separately.
settings.deleteDepotConfirm: Delete depot "{name}" and all its data? This cannot be undone.

login.tagline: Track your dividends and savings yields
login.title: Sign in

confirm.title: Confirm your email
confirm.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email address.

footer.tagline: Track dividends from stocks and savings yields from any bank - all in one place.
footer.disclaimerText: This app is for personal finance tracking only. Nothing here constitutes financial or investment advice.

landing.heroTitle: Watch your money grow, one entry at a time.
landing.heroSub: Track dividends and savings yields yourself - manually, month by month. Feel your financial progress, not just see it.
landing.philosophyTitle: Every entry is a small celebration.
landing.philosophyBody: We built the-yields for people who want to feel their financial progress. When a dividend arrives or interest posts, you open the app, enter the amount yourself, and watch your income grow. That intentional moment of ownership - that's the whole point.
landing.feature1Desc: Log dividend income by ticker, see monthly breakdowns across every stock in your portfolio.
landing.feature2Desc: Track savings account interest from any bank, organized month by month.
landing.feature3Desc: Monthly, quarterly, yearly, and cumulative charts - spot trends and see your income grow over time.
landing.feature4Desc: Set yearly targets for dividends and yields. Live donut charts show your progress at a glance.
landing.feature5Desc: Monitor your Steuerfreibetrag with a dedicated progress indicator that turns amber the moment you exceed it.
landing.feature6Desc: See exactly which tickers and savings accounts drive your income with an instant visual breakdown.
landing.feature7Desc: A heatmap grid showing every month across all years. Spot your strongest seasons and watch year-over-year growth at a glance.
landing.feature8Desc: Track investments across multiple brokers or accounts separately. Each depot keeps its own data — perfect for Trade Republic, IBKR, or any other provider side by side.
landing.step1Desc: Enter your stock tickers and savings accounts once.
landing.step2Desc: As dividends and yields arrive, enter them manually - a small ritual that makes every payment feel real and rewarding.
landing.step3Desc: Charts and totals update instantly. See your history compound across months and years.
landing.ctaSub: Sign up, enter your first payment, and celebrate every step of your financial journey.

cookie.message: We use only technically necessary storage for sign-in, preferences and session handling.

forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.successSub: We sent a password reset code to your email address.
